title.en: They have only one goal - Innate Origin Life!

content.en:
The other True Monarchs were afraid of the power of the Four True Monarchs and did not dare to do it again, while the Four True Monarchs were because the Innate Origin Life had not been completely conceived and had not done it, otherwise the snatched Innate Origin Thing could not become an Innate Origin Life, and could only be regarded as a top-level Innate Origin Thing.

The top-level innate origin things were indeed very precious in the past, but this time they entered the realm of the realm of origin and obtained too many top-level innate origin things, so they didn't care about one more or less.

They have only one goal - Innate Origin Life!

But there is only one innate origin life, how to distribute so many true monarchs, this is indeed a problem.

However, this Wuzhi Mountain is rich in resources, but there are a lot of innate origin things, so other true monarchs can snatch other innate origin things, if you can get the innate origin life while taking advantage of the chaos, it will be a great luck and a big harvest.

For this reason, they did not leave this place of right and wrong, but chose to stay and watch and wait.

It doesn't take long for the Innate Origin Life to be conceived, otherwise these True Monarchs would not have the patience to wait and would have left here to find other Innate Origin Things.

After all, there are too many innate origin things in the realm of the realm of origin, and there will be a big harvest if you shop around, and wasting a little time is a waste of a lot of innate origin things!

Time passed day by day, and a month passed in the blink of an eye.

this day.

The innate origin life conceived inside the stone in the center of Wuzhi Mountain was completely formed.

Boom!

The stone shattered, and a humanoid innate origin life was born.

Although it is humanoid, it has no pores and hair, and it has no specific face, and the whole person is like an energy human body.

Then.

A true monarch who was proficient in the Great Dao of Space, cast a starry sky shifting supernatural ability, and with the help of a half-Dao level space treasure, he came to the side of the innate origin life in an instant, wanting to seize this innate origin life in one fell swoop.

"It's the True Monarch of the Starry Sky!"

Someone shouted.

The strength of the Starry Sky True Monarch is not as good as the True Monarch List, but in today's Quasi-Dao Realm, it can definitely rank among the top tens of thousands, which is already an incomparably terrifying combat power.

"Look for death!"

The Dawn True Monarch is furious,

A ray of morning light crossed time and space, instantly freezing the starry sky true monarch.

At this time, the Starry Sky True Monarch was imprisoned, and his body gradually cracked, and his pupils were full of fear.

He was afraid of the strength of the Morning Light True Monarch, and just one casual blow would completely annihilate his vitality.

He far overestimated his own strength and underestimated the combat power of those True Monarchs at the top of the True Monarch List, otherwise he would never have taken the risk of snatching the Innate Origin Life.

This is not to blame for his misjudgment, because he used to be in the chaos, almost invincible in an area, although he had heard of the combat power of those invincible true monarchs, but he had never really fought against them.

Coupled with the fact that he was so confident in his spatial abilities that he made the wrong judgment.

A mistake completely cost him his life.

Bang!

The Starry Sky True Monarch shattered into pieces of wreckage and fell to the ground, and a powerful top-notch True Monarch fell and died.

And with the fall of the Starry Sky True Monarch, the other True Monarchs stopped one after another, not daring to fight the idea of the Innate Origin Life anymore.

Rumble!!!!

The four true monarchs fought against each other, and the terrifying impact swept across this area, and some true monarchs were directly annihilated before they had time to leave.

This scene frightened other True Monarchs to shuttle away, but more than 10,000 True Monarchs still fell.

These more than 10,000 true monarchs are not killed in battle, but are affected to death, which is really unlucky.

After fighting for half an hour, Chenguang Zhenjun took the lead and left here with a seriously injured body, giving up his innate origin life.

This is also a helpless move, otherwise the Dawn True Monarch will fall here.

Another half an hour passed, and the ** True Monarch of the Immortal Gate fled with serious injuries, leaving only the Falling Sea True Monarch of the Chaos Trading House and the Shadow Zero True Monarch of the God of War Tower.

Judging from the ranking, the Shadow Zero True Monarch is even more powerful, but the Luohai True Monarch is too rich, he is a half-way weapon, and he has a medium-grade defensive half-way weapon and a high-grade defensive half-way weapon, and the Luohai True Ring weapon in his hand is also a high-grade half-way weapon.

With the addition of many half-dao weapons, coupled with the invincibility of defense, Luohai Zhenjun did not suffer any injuries at all, but the Shadow Zero True Monarch gradually worsened his injuries.

In the end, Luohai Zhenjun won the victory and took away the innate origin life.

......

Soon after.

One terrifying figure after another came here, among them was the Longhai True Monarch of the Void Heaven Palace, and there was even a shortage of True Monarchs in the top ten on the True Monarch List.

But after they arrived, when they saw the almost destroyed Wuzhi Mountain, they immediately sighed: "It's too late, the innate origin life has been snatched away!"

Many True Monarchs knew that the True Monarch of the Falling Sea had snatched away the innate origin life, and they all wanted to besiege and kill the True Monarch of the Falling Sea.

However, Luohai Zhenjun was also very bold, giving up other innate origin things, directly breaking the world barrier of the boundary source realm, leaving the realm of the boundary source, and returning to the headquarters of the Chaos Trading House as quickly as possible.

In this way, the true monarch of the sea can be regarded as truly safe.

It is foreseeable that it will not be long before Luohai Zhenjun can definitely use the Innate Origin Life to break through the shackles of the prototype of the Great Dao and cultivate a Great Dao to the perfection level of 100,000 meters.

Such a true monarch is enough to be called a half-step true ancestor!

----------

"There is an innate origin life born !!!"

Ye Tian was also surprised, this news came from the Dawn Light True Monarch of the Void Heaven Palace, and now most of the True Monarchs of the Void Heaven Hall have received the news, and as the Dao Ancestor of the Void Heaven lineage, he naturally got the news.

It's a pity that the Void Heaven Temple didn't take the innate origin life.

"What a pity!"

Ye Tian sighed.

He also wants to get the innate origin life, this super innate origin thing is also very helpful to him, although with his endless avenue, a super innate origin thing may not be able to help him break the shackles, but at least it has a huge help!

"Wuzhi Mountain, I guess there are no people now, go over and take a look!"

Ye Tian changed direction and flew in the direction of Wuzhi Mountain.

After a long time, Ye Tiancai came to Wuzhi Mountain.

At this time, there was no Wuzhi Mountain here, the entire mountain peak and the nearby mountains were all flattened, and the land in this area was also cut tens of thousands of meters deep, which was the result of the battle.

Ye Tian felt the aura of fighting around him, as well as the traces left by the battle of the Four True Monarchs and the True Monarch List, and deeply felt the fierceness of the time and the strength of the True Monarch List, just the aura left behind brought him a trace of threat, if he faced himself, he probably wouldn't even have the ability to escape.

Perhaps out of instinct, Ye Tian habitually used his copying talent to cover the area near Wuzhi Mountain, even the underground area.

In the realm of the Origin of the Realm, the scope of the copying talent is even wider than the scope of divine sense exploration, and in terms of the ability to detect life, there is no ability that can compare to the copying talent, even if someone can cultivate the hidden origin supernatural power, there is no way to hide the copying talent.

This probe, Ye Tian's eyes widened.

His eyes stared at the deep underground area under the original Five Finger Mountain, and he was shocked in his heart: "That's ......"
